models.description: Balanced Claude model for coding, analysis, agent workflows, and cost control

models.name: Claude Sonnet 4 (latest)
models.description: Balanced Claude model for coding, analysis, agent workflows, and cost control

notes: Claude 4 manual thinking uses thinking.type = "enabled" with budget_tokens.
Interleaved thinking requires the interleaved-thinking-2025-05-14 beta header for this model family.

models.name: Claude Opus 4.5 (latest)
models.description: Flagship Claude model for deep reasoning, coding, and long-horizon agents

notes: Claude Opus 4.5 uses manual thinking.type = "enabled" with budget_tokens; effort can be used alongside the thinking budget.
Interleaved thinking requires the interleaved-thinking-2025-05-14 beta header.

models.name: Claude Sonnet 4.5 (latest)
models.description: Balanced Claude model for coding, analysis, agent workflows, and cost control

notes: Claude 4 manual thinking uses thinking.type = "enabled" with budget_tokens.
Interleaved thinking requires the interleaved-thinking-2025-05-14 beta header for this model family.

models.name: Claude Opus 4.7
models.description: Flagship Claude model for deep reasoning, coding, and long-horizon agents

notes: Claude Opus 4.7 and newer Opus models require thinking.type = "adaptive" to enable thinking explicitly.
Manual budget_tokens requests return 400 on Claude Opus 4.7 and newer adaptive-only Opus models.
task_budget is separate from thinking control and should not be treated as a thinking budget.

models.name: Claude Sonnet 5
models.description: Everyday Claude agent model for coding, planning, browsing, and general work

models.name: Claude Sonnet 3
models.description: Balanced Claude model for coding, analysis, agent workflows, and cost control

models.name: Claude Opus 4.8
models.description: Top Claude Opus tier for the hardest reasoning, coding, and long-horizon agents

notes: Claude Opus 4.7 and newer Opus models require thinking.type = "adaptive" to enable thinking explicitly.
Manual budget_tokens requests return 400 on Claude Opus 4.7 and newer adaptive-only Opus models.
task_budget is separate from thinking control and should not be treated as a thinking budget.

models.name: Claude Opus 3
models.description: Flagship Claude model for deep reasoning, coding, and long-horizon agents

models.name: Claude Haiku 3.5 (latest)
models.description: Fast Claude model for responsive assistance, classification, and lightweight agents

models.name: Claude Opus 4.1 (latest)
models.description: Flagship Claude model for deep reasoning, coding, and long-horizon agents

notes: Claude 4 manual thinking uses thinking.type = "enabled" with budget_tokens.
Interleaved thinking requires the interleaved-thinking-2025-05-14 beta header for this model family.

models.name: Claude Fable 5
models.description: Claude model for creative writing, analysis, and controlled agent workflows

notes: Adaptive thinking is always on for Claude Fable 5 and Claude Mythos 5; thinking.type = "disabled" is rejected.
Manual budget_tokens requests return 400 on Claude Fable 5 and Claude Mythos 5.
thinking.display defaults to omitted; set display to summarized to receive readable thinking summaries.

models.name: Claude Haiku 4.5 (latest)
models.description: Fast Claude model for responsive assistance, classification, and lightweight agents

notes: Claude 4 manual thinking uses thinking.type = "enabled" with budget_tokens.
Interleaved thinking requires the interleaved-thinking-2025-05-14 beta header for this model family.

models.name: Claude Opus 4.6 (latest)
models.description: Flagship Claude model for deep reasoning, coding, and long-horizon agents

notes: Anthropic recommends adaptive thinking with effort for Claude 4.6; budget_tokens remains a deprecated compatibility path.
Anthropic API defaults effort to high; lower effort levels should be chosen per workload.
